name: mojo-runtime-crash-bisection
description: Systematic approach for bisecting Mojo runtime crashes to create minimal reproducers and isolate root causes. Use when: (1) Mojo runtime crashes with no clear error, (2) crashes in libKGENCompilerRTShared.so or libAsyncRTRuntimeGlobals.so, (3) need to create upstream bug reports for modular/modular.
